name: Bearing Lithium Corp.
summary: Bearing Lithium Corp. operates as a lithium-focused mineral exploration and development company. It principally explores for lithium and potassium deposits. The company's primary asset is the 17.35% owned Maricunga Lithium Brine project that comprises 4,463 hectares of old code and new code tenements covering a portion of the Maricunga Salar in northern Chile. Bearing Lithium Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
